winPackagedSmokePrereq0: Locally: npm run check:release (or pack:dir + verify:win-unpacked + smoke:packaged-release).
winPackagedSmokePrereq1: Folder dist/win-unpacked/ with FluxAlloy.exe and resources/bin/*.exe.
winPackagedSmokePrereq2: Clean userData profile (first launch) or intentional test over an existing profile.
winPackagedSmokeStep_engines: Status bar: yt-dlp / ffmpeg / ffprobe versions with no “not found” errors.
winPackagedSmokeStep_open_file: Editor: open a local MP4/MKV; preview plays and scrub works.
winPackagedSmokeStep_ytdlp: Downloads: short URL (10–30 s), queue reaches Done, log has no ERROR.
winPackagedSmokeStep_editor_from_dl: From queue/history: Open in editor for a finished file.
winPackagedSmokeStep_export: MP4 segment export (libx264) completes without error.
winPackagedSmokeStep_video_sprite: §7.5: FFmpeg rail → preview sprite sheet (PNG/JPEG); grid file saves; see ownerManualSmoke Video sprite.
winPackagedSmokeStep_knowledge: Knowledge base: open an article; internal .md link works.
winPackagedSmokeStep_support_zip: About → Support ZIP: archive is created; no secrets in the text.
winPackagedSmokeStep_settings: Settings → Dependencies: engine paths point at resources/bin.
winPackagedSmokePass0: No crash when closing the main window and relaunching the exe.
winPackagedSmokePass1: Download progress column shows labels during post-processing merge/embed.
winPackagedSmokePass2: userData/logs have no tokens/passwords; dist/ artifacts have no .env.
